name: Findoo DataHub
description: Unified financial data source — free mode (CCXT/CoinGecko/DefiLlama/Yahoo) + full mode (172 DataHub endpoints)

datahubApiKey.description: DataHub API key — enables full 172 endpoints. Leave empty for free data sources only

tushareProxyUrl.description: Tushare proxy URL (legacy, used when DataHub key is absent)

coingeckoApiKey.description: CoinGecko API key for higher rate limits

mode.description: auto = pick based on apiKey; free = free sources only; full = force DataHub
